title: Butchercraft: Tannery
description: This mod expands Butchercraft by adding a full tanning and hide-processing system.
body:
Butchercraft: Tannery is an addon for **Butchercraft** that introduces a functional hide-tanning process using a Tanning Rack.

**How It Works**

Replaces the leather dropped from Butchercraft meat hooks with Raw Hides. These must be processed using the new Tanning Rack.

- Place the Tanning Rack in direct sunlight, two blocks above a campfire
- Right-click a Raw Hide onto the Tanning Rack and scrape it clean using a knife
- In 60 seconds (configurable), the hide will cure into ready-to-use leather
